pages.text: The Shadow Shrieker is an exquisite creation that combines many characteristics of the Sculk domain into one. Through a specific ritual, it can summon a loyal Warden servant to serve you. To create a Warden servant, you must first place the Shadow Shrieker above a Cursed Cage filled with soul energy. After completing this step, use a Profound Echoing Shard on it, and a fearsome Warden servant will appear.

The Shadow Shrieker can also defend automatically. Simply store Profound Echoing Shards in a container adjacent to it, and set up Sculk Sensors around it. Once the sensors detect unwelcome activity, they will send a signal to the shrieker. The shrieker will then consume a shard and summon a Warden servant to eliminate the offenders.

Its working principle is to combine the power of various Sculk items and instruments into one, thus creating a small piece of false Deep Dark. Through this created abnormal environment, and then infused with pure soul energy, a Warden servant that obeys you can be shaped.
